introSection: Apple is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Operated at the Hoppings in June 2015. In August 2016 this ride was operating at Barry Island Pleasure Park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride has the Wacky Worm layout. Pink track with yellow/orange supports and green fencing on the station and lift hill.

fullText:
Apple is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster.

Operated at the Hoppings in June 2015. In August 2016 this ride was operating at Barry Island Pleasure Park.

This ride has the Wacky Worm layout. Pink track with yellow/orange supports and green fencing on the station and lift hill.
